info.title: Autosend Domains API
info.description: Manage your domains associated with your Autosend project. Domains are used to send email via AutoSend. After adding a domain you must configure DNS records and trigger verification before it can be used for sending.

get.description: Returns all domains added to the project, including their current verification status and DNS record states.

post.description: Adds a new domain to the project. After adding, configure the returned DNS records in your DNS provider and call the verify endpoint to trigger verification.

get.description: Returns a single domain by its ID, including its current verification status and DNS record states.

delete.description: Removes a domain from the project. This action cannot be undone. Any senders or campaigns using this domain may be affected.

post.description: Triggers a background check of the domain's DNS records and verification state.
